title: pleopeltis limaeformis
intro: Pleopeltis limaeformis, also known as the "lima polypody," is a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pleopeltis limaeformis include its potential use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
